title: Qiaokeli Dictate: License, fixes, streaming preview; Data Screening LLM init
selftext:
\## What Shipped

Qiaokeli Dictate received several updates including an MIT license addition, fixes for Chinese transcript cleanup and prompt bleed, a new streaming preview feature with final correction mode, and improved backend selection with a default speed profile.

Data Screening LLM project was initialized.

## Why It Matters

The Qiaokeli Dictate improvements enhance usability for Chinese users with better text processing and real-time feedback during dictation. The added license clarifies usage terms. The new project provides a foundation for future development.

## Next

Plan to build upon the Data Screening LLM project foundation. Consider further refinements to Qiaokeli Dictate based on user feedback.
